name: pl-ru-codex
description: Repo-local Codex skills and workflow guardrails for PL_RU.

interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin with PL_RU bootstrap, audit orchestration, frontend rules, quality tooling, and GitHub ship workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $pl-ru-audit-orchestrator for broad audits, instruction changes, and quality-tooling work.
Use $pl-ru-ship to prepare this PL_RU change for PR.
Use $pl-ru-frozen-decisions to protect frozen decisions and session-memory rules.
